name: Easy Hamburger Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cheddar or Swiss Cheese, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Drain the fat and set the meat aside.
3. In a bowl, blend together the mayonnaise, milk, eggs, and cornstarch until smooth.
4. Stir in the meat, cheese, onions, and pepper.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until browned on top.
7. Serves 6 to 8
8. Can be frozen.
